extra.message: User-controlled name is interpolated into the template source on line 38 and then rendered with Jinja2 Template(content).render(). An attacker can inject Jinja template expressions such as {{...}}, causing server-side template injection and potential code execution.

cwe: CWE-1336: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine

extra.message: The name query parameter is inserted directly into an HTML response without escaping. A request such as /?name=<script>alert(1)</script> would be reflected in the returned HTML and execute in the browser.
A secret token is hardcoded directly in application configuration as SUPER_SECRET_TOKEN. Hardcoded secrets can be recovered from source code and reused by attackers.
The request handler performs an outbound requests.get() call without a timeout. A slow or unresponsive upstream service can tie up request handling resources and cause denial of service.
